code:
import io
import string

fn parse_second(_ line: String) -> Option<Int>
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  # skip leading whitespace
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9
        i = i + 1
      else
        i = n + 1
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
  end
  if i > n
    i = i - 1
  else
    return None
  end
  # skip first token
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9
        i = n + 1
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
  end
  if i > n
    i = i - 1
  else
    return None
  end
  # skip whitespace before second token
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9
        i = i + 1
      else
        i = n + 1
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
  end
  if i > n
    i = i - 1
  else
    return None
  end
  let start = i
  # find end of second token
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9
        i = n + 1
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
  end
  let stop = if i > n
    i - 1
  else
    n
  end
  let token = string.substring(line, start, stop)
  string.parse_int(token)
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut total = 0
  mut done = false
  while not done
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      if string.is_empty(line)
        total = total
      else
        match parse_second(line)
        when Some(v)
          total = total + v
        when None
          total = total
        end
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  println("sum=#{total}")
end
